/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rtes_main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/rtes_main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtes_main.dir/positiondetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtes_main.dir/ledcallback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtes_main.dir/imureader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtes_main.dir/Icm20948driver.cpp.o -o rtes_main   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lgpiod -lgpiodcxx -lmraa -lyaml-cpp -lpthread
